fix: add Cloud Run domain mappings for custom domains

Cloud Run requires domain mappings to accept requests with custom Host
headers. Without these, Cloudflare-proxied requests arrive with
Host: interview-hub.lcarera.dev but Cloud Run only recognizes its
native .run.app hostname, returning 404.

CNAME targets in Cloudflare must be updated to ghs.googlehosted.com.

commit.message:
Fix: Replace missing textarea and use-toast imports with sonner and native textarea

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add version sync guard to catch stale dev tool binaries

Adds a pre-push check that verifies installed tool versions match
pyproject.toml specs, preventing CI failures from silent version drift
(e.g. stale ruff 0.8.6 in venv while pyproject.toml specifies ^0.15.2).

Part 1 — this project:
- scripts/check_tool_versions.py: reads pyproject.toml, converts Poetry
  caret/tilde specs to PEP 440, checks via importlib.metadata
- scripts/pre-push: runs version check as first step
- Justfile: adds check-versions target

Part 2 — pypreset feature (--version-sync-guard):
- models.py: version_sync_guard field on FormattingConfig
- check_tool_versions.py.j2: parameterized template (Poetry/uv/setuptools)
- pre-commit-config.yaml.j2: local repo hook at pre-push stage
- generator.py, cli.py, preset_loader.py, template_engine.py: wired up
- augment_generator.py: VersionSyncGuardGenerator component
- 29 new tests (spec conversion, mismatch detection, generator, augment)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: rename createClient() admin fn to criarCliente() to avoid conflict with Supabase SDK

createClient was declared twice in the same JS scope:
1. `const { createClient } = supabase` (Supabase SDK)
2. `async function createClient()` (admin fn to create new clients)

This SyntaxError prevented all JS from loading, breaking the login function.

commit.message:
Add AI-generated content for Professional users

Meeting Sim — infinite AI cards:
- After completing all 5 hardcoded cards, Pro users see a "Generating..."
  loading screen (Loader2 spinner) instead of the complete screen
- Calls new /api/generate-meeting-cards (gpt-4o) with industry, role,
  challenges, and previously seen questions to avoid repeats
- New cards inject seamlessly into the same session; generates another
  batch after each completion — Pro users never run out of content
- Free users still see the completion screen after card 1 (upgrade wall)
- On API failure, falls back to reshuffled original 5 with a toast
- Tracks aiGeneratedCardsCompleted in profile.preferences

Scenarios — AI generation for mastered pillars:
- New /api/generate-scenarios (gpt-4o) generates 3 scenarios per pillar
  with full options and feedback, tailored to user role/industry/challenges
- When a Pro user completes ALL scenarios in a pillar, a generate card
  appears above the filter row with "You've mastered [Pillar]." prompt
- Loading state shows 3 blurred skeleton cards while generating
- AI scenarios render with same ScenarioCard UI + "✨ AI" badge
- DB writes skipped for AI scenario completions (handleComplete/handleNext
  guard on id.startsWith("ai-"))
- Saves generated titles to profile.preferences.aiGeneratedScenarioTitles
  to prevent repeats across sessions

Progress page: "✨ X AI-generated cards practiced" stat in Meeting Sim section
Types: added aiGeneratedCardsCompleted, aiGeneratedScenarioTitles to UserPreferences

commit.message:
Fix page unresponsiveness when uploading images in tour creation form

Store blob URLs (URL.createObjectURL) in React state instead of base64
data URLs. With 6×7MB images, base64 in state was ~56MB causing every
re-render (checkbox click, input change) to freeze the browser.

Files are kept in imageFilesRef (Map<blobUrl, File>) and converted to
base64 via resolveBlobUrls() only at submit/draft-save time — not during
user interaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: follow-up reviews check if requested changes were addressed

When resuming a review (2nd+ visit), Claude now:
1. Reads previous findings from REVIEW_NOTES.md
2. Fetches PR review comments and requested changes via gh
3. Pulls latest commits
4. Verifies each requested change was addressed
5. Reports: resolved, still pending, new issues
6. Updates REVIEW_NOTES.md and gives updated verdict

feat: add Domains collection, migrate domain from text to relationship

Domain is an entity identified by DomainSlug — not a text field.
- New Domains collection with slug, name, description, tenant
- Join fields for reverse navigation (nouns, readings, etc.)
- domainScope.ts: text field → relationship to domains
- Generator: domains field → relationship hasMany
- Seed handler: ensureDomain() resolves slug → ID
- All 16 domain tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

[CI/CD] Switch deploy to MCP server — eliminates API session contention

The direct Acumatica API login consumed a session slot, but with only
~2-3 concurrent sessions allowed by the license, the CI/CD deploy was
starved (all 5 retries exhausted with HTTP 500 API Login Limit).

Now deploys via the Acumatica MCP server which shares its existing
session — no new login needed. Uses acumatica_customization_import
and acumatica_customization_publish MCP tools via JSON-RPC.

Replaces 8 Acumatica credential secrets with 1 MCP token secret.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Powder Mountain, 6am scraper, smart digest (#3)

* Track and display exact lift opening times

- Add first_opened_at column to daily_summary table with migration for existing DBs
- Record timestamp when a lift is first seen as "open" each day
- Display opening time in status pill (e.g. "Opened 9:30 AM") instead of just "Opened"
- Backfill existing opening times from terrain_snapshots on startup
- Add /api/last-scrape endpoint to diagnose missing scrape data
- Pass scraped_at through all update_daily_summary call sites

https://claude.ai/code/session_01KFfHYrgST63wqUtWws31MV

* Fix resort cards not showing and add snapshot backfill for missing dates

Root cause: /api/status only returned resorts with daily_summary data.
When the scraper failed, no terrain rows existed, so ALL resort cards
disappeared — including weather that was working independently.

Fixes:
- Always return all 4 tracked resorts in /api/status even without terrain data
- Add try/except to run_scrape() with per-resort error logging
- Add backfill_daily_from_snapshots() to recover daily_summary from
  terrain_snapshots when the save pipeline crashed partway through
- Auto-backfill last 7 days of snapshot data on startup
- Add POST /api/backfill endpoint for manual date recovery

https://claude.ai/code/session_01KFfHYrgST63wqUtWws31MV

* Add Powder Mountain (James Peak), 6am scraper start, smart digest triggering

- Add Powder Mountain scraper tracking James Peak terrain via Playwright
- Change terrain scrape schedule from 7am to 6am MT start
- Replace fixed digest cron with smart triggering: auto-generates after
  both avalanche forecast and terrain data are available for the day
- Keep 10am fallback digest in case auto-trigger doesn't fire
- Add Powder Mountain to weather forecasts, digest, and frontend
- Keep avalanche schedule at 5-9am as requested

https://claude.ai/code/session_01KFfHYrgST63wqUtWws31MV

---------

commit.message:
fix: Use 'recognize --json' command for SongRec instead of 'audio-file-to-recognized-song' (#282)

The audio-file-to-recognized-song subcommand hangs on headless Linux because
the packaged SongRec binary links GTK4 and tries to initialize display subsystems.
The 'recognize --json' subcommand works correctly without a display.

Also adds genre fallback from track.genres.primary when sections metadata
doesn't contain a Genre field (which is the case in real Shazam responses).

Enhance phrase generator: skeleton, extensions, bebop scale, cross-chord VL, motif memory

Add generation metadata (SkeletonMeta, DigitalPatternTag, goalReason, isSkeletonBeat,
isBebopPassing) to PhraseNote/GeneratedPhrase types. Expand digital patterns from 21
to 33 (new descending/hybrid/extended patterns). Increase digital pattern fire rate to 42%.

Localize PhraseAnalysisPanel to Japanese: all labels, function names, contour names,
approach type labels. Add tooltips with explanations on every parameter. Replace
skeleton beat dot marker with background highlight. Format motif as directional
intervals (↑3半音, ↓2半音). Remove redundant narrative text. Fix approach direction
label order (半音↑アプローチ).

Add comprehensive documentation (docs/index.html).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ml): market-neutralise target + 6-fold CV to reduce regime-driven variance

Root cause of fold-to-fold IC variance (fold_1=+0.09, fold_2=-0.06):
  Without target neutralisation, the vol-adjusted forward return still has
  a large market-level component.  In a bull-market fold the model learns
  "momentum = good", in a bear-market fold it learns the opposite.  The
  model sees BOTH market direction AND cross-sectional ranking mixed in y,
  which makes it unstable across regime changes.

Fix 1 — Market-neutralise y per date:
  y_neutral_t = y_t - mean(y across all tickers on date t)
  This is pure cross-sectional alpha: which stock beats its peers on the
  same 20-day forward window, regardless of whether the market is up or down.
  Implementation: groupby(date).transform(lambda g: g - g.mean()) applied
  to the full (date, ticker) stacked target — no look-ahead since we only
  use the same-date cross-section, not future dates.

Fix 2 — n_splits: 4→6
  With 1582 unique dates over 2019–2024, 4 folds give ~395 test dates each
  (~1.5 years/fold).  6 folds give ~264 test dates each (~1 year/fold), which:
  - Better quantifies per-regime performance (2019 bull, 2020 COVID, 2021
    rate hike, 2022 bear, 2023 recovery, 2024 AI rally)
  - Reduces variance of the mean IC estimate by sqrt(6/4)=1.22x
  - Earlier folds still have large training sets (expanding window)

Expected result: fold-to-fold IC variance should decrease significantly.
Mean IC target: >+0.02 consistently across all 6 folds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

The lunar package sometimes returns 诸事不宜 ("nothing recommended")
alongside actual activities, which is contradictory. Now filtered out
when other activities are present; kept when it appears alone.

Affects 3 days in the Mar–Dec 2026 range (Mar 7, Mar 19, May 2).

commit.message:
fix: send browser push notifications on digest generation

Digest workflow only sent Expo push (device tokens). Browser/web push
subscribers were never notified despite having notify_digest=true in
browser_push_subscriptions. Add sendDigestBrowserPushStep that fetches
all browser subscribers opted into digest and sends web push alongside
the existing Expo step. Also auto-deactivates expired subscriptions (410/404).

commit.message:
Add GitHub Pages static version with localStorage storage adapter

The self-hosted server version requires a backend and SQLite, making it
impossible to share publicly. This adds a second build target that runs
entirely in the browser using localStorage, so anyone can track their
own TFSA room without needing the server.

The core change is a StorageAdapter interface that both the server
(ApiAdapter, wrapping existing fetch calls) and the static build
(LocalAdapter, reading/writing localStorage) implement. App now
accepts a storage prop instead of calling fetch directly, so the
same component tree works for both targets.

The static entry point (main-static.tsx) shows an onboarding form on
first visit to collect birth year and current CRA room, then seeds an
opening balance contribution and stores config in localStorage. Return
visits skip straight to the dashboard. An Export/Import panel lets users
back up and restore their data as JSON.

getTotalRoomForBirthYear and getFirstEligibleYear were added to
tfsa.ts so the static version can compute each user's personal
contribution room based on their birth year, and filter the year grid to
only show years they were eligible for.

Deployment is fully automated: pushing to main triggers a GitHub Actions
workflow that runs bun run build:static and publishes dist/ to
GitHub Pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

blocking profitable March picks (72.1% raw, 71.4% signal-supported).
Today it blocked 4 high-edge multi-model picks (Maxey edge 8.5, SGA 6.6,
Giannis 4.9, Brown 4.0). The under_star_away filter (AWAY + line >= 23)
remains as a more targeted version.

Research agent investigating seasonal activation patterns for possible
calendar-regime-aware re-implementation.

fix(ci): fix Blank Page Inspector gate grep mismatch causing false NO-GO

The workflow grepped for "Blank pages found: 0" but the script outputs
"All PDFs have no blank pages!" — causing the gate to always FAIL.

Also made Build & Lint gate capture lint exit code properly so it can
detect errors even when set -eo pipefail would exit the script early.

commit.message:
Add searchlight-only mode for continuous targets and fix data_loader column handling

- searchlight.py: Use KFold for regression instead of StratifiedKFold with
  binned labels, which was fragile for continuous targets
- run_mvpa_analysis.py: Add --searchlight-only flag to skip whole-brain
  Decoder (inappropriate for continuous targets like log_auc), add
  --searchlight-n-perm-fwer arg, detect target_response designs
- data_loader.py: Fix undefined 'columns' variable (F821) by using
  raw_columns with isinstance(dict) guards; normalize column names to
  handle both string and dict formats in design_summary.json
